creator: adamw@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 243184
5.38.0

Hi Mat,

Not sure if this is helpful. If this just makes more work for you, let me know.

The attached patch updates perl5.38 to 5.38.0. The test suite passes except for an attempt to connect to syslogd that is disabled in the poudriere jail, and it is of course testport successful.
